recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: The Dig
recommendations.overview: As WWII looms, a wealthy widow hires an amateur archaeologist to excavate the burial mounds on her estate. When they make a historic discovery, the echoes of Britain's past resonate in the face of its uncertain future‎.

recommendations.title: Young Woman and the Sea

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.
